one_worldstate_type: swm/world_model_v2/state.py (+ transitions.StateDelta); v1 legacy under swm/state, swm/api NOT reachable from facade

phase2_evidence.how: gather_evidence only via simulate_with_posterior, NOT via facade pipeline.simulate

phase3_posterior.how: simulate_with_posterior is a SEPARATE orchestration; no production caller

phase4_actor_policy.how: operators self-register in transitions._OPERATORS; fire only if plan names them

phase6_registry.how: registry families registered; selected by compiler

phase8_persistence.how: run_with_persistence invoked from pipeline.simulate when persistence arg passed

phase10_institutions.how: institutions_v2 operators self-register; RuleSystem built in run_from_plan; fire if plan names them

phase11_recompilation.how: RecompilationController.run only referenced in its own module + tests; ExecutionAdapter seam ready

gap: No module orchestrates P1+P2+P3+P8+P9+P11 through one shared plan/world/funnel. This run builds simulate_world() to do so and routes the facade to it by default.
phase12_calibrator_status: provisional (pre-unification distribution); must be marked incompatible with the unified runtime and refit after this PR merges.
